Container.Name: appwork
Container.Overview: Appwork — visual brand and UI spec editor. Build, manage, and export design specs with a React/Express stack.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Appwork web interface.

Config.Name: Projects Directory
Config.Description: Directory where Appwork stores project JSON files.

Config.Name: Host Bind
Config.Description: Interface the server binds to. Keep 0.0.0.0 for Unraid.

Config.Name: Port (env)
Config.Description: Must match the port mapping above.

Config.Name: Projects Dir (env)
Config.Description: Internal container path. Must match the path mapping above.
